parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'done', result: { architectureEvaluation: { recommended: $json.recommendedArchitecture, confidence: $json.confidence, rationale: $json.rationale, comparisonMatrix: typeof $json.comparisonMatrix === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.comparisonMatrix) : $json.comparisonMatrix, options: typeof $json.fullOptions === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.fullOptions) : $json.fullOptions } } }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: $json.success, workflow: $json.workflow, kind: $json.kind, status: $json.status, receivedAt: $json.receivedAt, result: typeof $json.result === 'string' ? JSON.parse($json.result) : $json.result }) }}
